2.0 Violation Details

MEDIUM VIO-001 SBC Ref: 51-4.2.1

Wire identification markers/labels at terminals

Description Worker handling exposed electrical wires while standing on ladder. Wires are not secured.
SBC Code 51-4.2.1 — Wiring shall be so arranged or marked that it can be identified for inspection, testing, repairs or alteration of the installation.
Priority MEDIUM
